summary: AI operating systems for real-economy businesses.
editor_note: The sharper bet is that mid-market operators need rebuilt workflows, not another AI sidebar. Ciridae shows AP invoices, CRM, reporting, project management, and Knight case metrics like $5M revenue uplift and 100% of A/P invoices processed. Unlike horizontal copilots, it embeds into how restoration or logistics companies already run. The risk is whether services work scales without becoming consulting.
